name: arcam_sa20
description: ARCAM SA20 network control plugin for Volumio with stable volume override and play automation
author: OpenAI

volumio_info.details: Controls an ARCAM SA20 amplifier over the documented TCP protocol on port 50000. Uses a stabilized Volumio volume override and can power on / source-switch / set startup volume on Play.
volumio_info.changelog: 0.18.0 Stop Volumio playback after 5 minutes if the SA20 becomes unavailable or is no longer on while playback is active; keep polling and status reflection.
